ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spatial_reference_systems" (
  "srs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SRS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SRS */,
  "projection_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym for the projection used in the SRS */,
  "ellipsoid_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym for the ellipsoid used in the SRS */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the SRS projection */,
  "srid" INTEGER /* SRID (Spatial Reference ID) of the SRS */,
  "auth_name" TEXT /* Name of the authority or organization defining the SRS */,
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* ID assigned by the authority for the SRS */,
  "is_geo" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the SRS is geographic (0 for projected, 1 for geographic) */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the SRS is deprecated */,
  "noupdate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the SRS should not be updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the SRS was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the SRS */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the SRS */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the SRS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("srs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_reference_systems_ellipsoid_acronym FOREIGN KEY ("ellipsoid_acronym") REFERENCES ellipsoids ("ellipsoid_acronym"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_reference_systems_projection_acronym FOREIGN KEY ("projection_acronym") REFERENCES projections ("projection_acronym")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "projection_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym for the projection */,
  "projection_name" TEXT /* Name of the projection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the projection */,
  "projection_type" TEXT /* Type of projection (e.g., cylindrical, conical, planar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ellipsoids" (
  "ellipsoid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ellipsoid */,
  "ellipsoid_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym for the ellipsoid */,
  "ellipsoid_name" TEXT /* Name of the ellipsoid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ellipsoid */,
  "semi_major_axis" TEXT /* Semi-major axis of the ellipsoid */,
  "semi_minor_axis" TEXT /* Semi-minor axis of the ellipsoid */,
  "inverse_flattening" TEXT /* Inverse flattening of the ellipsoid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ellipsoid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region or country */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the region or country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region or country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region or country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_regions" (
  "srs_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SRS-region link */,
  "srs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region or country */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the usage of the SRS in the region or country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("srs_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_regions_srs_id FOREIGN KEY ("srs_id") REFERENCES spatial_reference_systems ("srs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Log of user activities during the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SRS version */,
  "srs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the SRS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was deprecated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_versions_srs_id FOREIGN KEY ("srs_id") REFERENCES spatial_reference_systems ("srs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "srs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., meters, degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_parameters_srs_id FOREIGN KEY ("srs_id") REFERENCES spatial_reference_systems ("srs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authority or organization */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the authority or organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the authority or organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the authority or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the authority or organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_auth_links" (
  "srs_auth_link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SRS-authority link */,
  "srs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authority or organization */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the SRS and authority (e.g., defined by, maintained by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("srs_auth_link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_auth_links_srs_id FOREIGN KEY ("srs_id") REFERENCES spatial_reference_systems ("srs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_auth_links_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES srs_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "srs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the SRS */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team using the SRS */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the SRS was used */,
  "usage_details" TEXT /* Details of the usage */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the usage (e.g., issues encountered, successes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_usage_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_usage_logs_srs_id FOREIGN KEY ("srs_id") REFERENCES spatial_reference_systems ("srs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_usage_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members (comma-separated IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
